sections.paragraph:
ἄφωνος, ον [ἀ-priv., φωνή]

—1. ‘not making use of vocal chords’, mute/silent of a docile sheep Ac 8:32.

—2. ‘incapable of making any utterance’, mute 1 Cor 12:2.

—3. ‘incapable of human speech’, speechless, of Balaam’s ass 2 Pt 2:16.

—4. ‘not having meaning’, unintelligible 1 Cor 14:10.
